intro: A small, role-separated team stands behind the board. One group runs the day, one builds the models, one builds the pages you see, one guards the quality, and one keeps everything running — each is a separate set of eyes so no single mistake slips through.

seats.activity: Ready — runs the next work session and deploys what's ready.
Ready — keeps the task list ordered and two tasks from colliding.
Gameday chain fire verify; Coach coverage incident
Ready — maintains the game and player models.
Ready — tests new ideas against the record before they go live.
Ready — keeps the board and pages current.
Ready — keeps the record straight, with one source of truth.
Ready — writes every line in plain language.
Ready — keeps the operation running around the clock.
Ready — asks what each new capability unlocks that isn't obvious yet.

groups.name: Runs the day
groups.blurb: Keeps the work moving, decides what ships, and guards every page you see.

seats.does: Runs each work session — assigns the day's tasks, reviews the results, and ships what's ready.
Sets priorities, keeps the to-do list deep and ordered, and makes sure two tasks never collide.

groups.name: Builds the models
groups.blurb: Turns raw box scores into player ratings, team ratings, and game calls.

seats.does: Brings in and cleans every outside feed — scores, rosters, injuries — and keeps player identities straight across sources.
Rates and projects individual players — including the hard case of a rookie or newcomer who has no track record yet.
Rates whole teams, calls each game's margin, and sets the confidence range around every call.
Tests new ideas and methods against the record before any of them are allowed near the live product.

groups.name: Builds what you see
groups.blurb: Turns the models into the pages and reports in front of you.

seats.does: Builds the public board, the player pages, and the game readouts you are looking at right now.
Writes the game-day briefing and every board line in plain language — no jargon reaches this screen.

groups.name: Guards the quality
groups.blurb: Independent checks so a wrong number never reaches you.

seats.does: Re-derives every headline number from scratch, on its own, before a task is allowed to count as done.
Hunts for shortcuts and corner-cutting, and turns every mistake into a permanent check.
Keeps the record straight — no duplicate work, no contradicting notes, one source of truth.

groups.name: Keeps it running
groups.blurb: Keeps the operation alive around the clock and looks for what is next.

seats.does: Runs quietly in the background around the clock — it keeps the work session alive and lines up the next task whenever one is needed.
Asks what each new capability unlocks that isn't obvious yet — the source of new ideas.

source: the operating structure behind the platform
